appid.description: OpenWeather API key, sent as the appid query parameter; never logged.

lat.description: Latitude of the location to read (e.g. "33.44").

lon.description: Longitude of the location to read (e.g. "-94.04").

units.description: Optional unit system: standard, metric, or imperial. Absent when unset (OpenWeather's own default, standard/Kelvin, applies).

lang.description: Optional two-letter language code for weather condition text. Absent when unset.

base_url.description: OpenWeather API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
